# luci module
> LuCI API: cbi > **Live docs:** https://openwrt.github.io/luci/jsapi/LuCI.cbi.html --- cbi CBI (Configuration Bindings Interface) helper utilities and DOM helpers.
> **Total Context:** ~19723 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for luci that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~1770 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for luci when a larger context window is available. (~20416 tokens, l4-monolith)
